seoTitle: Mansfield Park vs Mantung — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mansfield Park and Mantung. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mansfield Park vs Mantung: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mansfield Park and Mantung.
heading: Mansfield Park vs Mantung — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mansfield Park, South Australia and Mantung, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mansfield Park has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Mantung (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mansfield Park or Mantung safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mansfield Park has a flood risk score of 43/100, while Mantung scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mansfield Park scores 50/100 for bushfire risk. Mantung scores 62/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mansfield Park or Mantung?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mansfield Park has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
